description: Two retrieved policy chunks conflict directly about whether appeals are allowed after June 1.
query: Can families appeal after June 1 in the Harbor rent assistance program?

retrieved_chunks.text: Families may appeal after June 1 if the denial letter is less than 14 days old.
Families may not appeal after June 1 under any circumstance.

final_answer: Families may appeal after June 1 if the denial letter is less than 14 days old.

entries.text: Families may appeal after June 1 if the denial letter is less than 14 days old.
Families may not appeal after June 1 under any circumstance.
